emails.body: Re: NEW IDA CONTRACTS FOR LOUISIANA-PACIFIC AND TAUBER PETROCHEMICAL Sorry I accidentally clicked on the wrong button--finger was faster than the brain... FYI I just updated EOL/Profile Manager with new contract numbers for the following counterparties: Louisiana-Pacific Corporation CP ID #3828 New Contract #96060718 Tauber Petrochemical Co. CP ID #57491 New Contract #96060719 Call me if you have any questions 5-4435 Thanks, Georgi From: Georgi Landau 05/21/2001 03:04 PM
